title: capsicum annuum var. glabriusculum
intro: Capsicum annuum var. glabriusculum, also known as 'bird's eye chilli' or 'Thai chilli', is a variety of the Capsicum annuum plant that belongs to the nightshade family. It is a popular ingredient in many Southeast Asian and Indian cuisines due to its intense heat and flavor. The medicinal properties of Capsicum annuum var. glabriusculum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate pain and protect against cell damage. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, and is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system.
